section.heading: Availability of funds

content.p: Amounts made available to carry out this division shall remain available until 10 years after February 9, 2018.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title XX, § 2060, as added Pub. L. 115–123, div. E, title VIII, § 50802(2), Feb. 9, 2018, 132 Stat. 281.)
